title: gladiolus miniatus
intro: Gladiolus miniatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the red gladiolus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus miniatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
